receipt_body_policy: receipts report paths hashes counts anchor results and pure-route behavior checks but never duplicate full source bodies, provider request/response payload bodies, account/session material, browser/HUD live access, recipient-send state, generated state output, or credential-equivalent payloads
public_runtime_policy: public validation uses exact source digests, anchor checks, syntax compilation, and pure route-overlay behavior checks; copied source modules are body evidence, not authority to call providers, execute local CLIs, access browser/HUD state, emit provider payload bodies, write generated state, mutate private state, or claim release authority.

modules.source_role: Pure bridge-route configuration helper that resolves route names, overlays route-specific timing and metadata, preserves caller config isolation, and returns effective timeout values without dispatching providers or touching live bridge state.
required_anchors: explicit_route -> root bridge_route -> nested bridge.route -> default_route
All helpers are pure and return fresh mappings rather than mutating caller-owned config objects.

modules.source_role: Pure macro regression test body that proves bridge route metadata/timing overlay and monitor-timeout precedence without filesystem, network, provider, browser, or session dependencies.
required_anchors: route-specific timings and metadata overlay the base bridge config
Tests stay pure and fixture-local with no filesystem or network involvement.
